summary: Comprehensive testing of Drops Curated v4 - Scheduler, Preferences, and Alerts. All 17 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI flows working correctly including the new 5-step subscription flow with preferences step.
test_credentials: Test phones: 9876543210 (existing subscriber), 9876543219-9876543220 (new test subscribers). Sandbox OTP auto-returned.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 7097+ scraped products from 14 brands
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is fully functional with scheduler, preferences, and alerts. Backend has 17 passing API tests covering: scheduler status (is_running, last_run, next_run, results), scheduler trigger, preferences CRUD (save/get with brands and alert_types), alerts recent log, scrape status (7000+ products, 14 brands, 14 scrapers), and full subscription flow with preferences. Frontend has 5-step subscription flow: Verify → Details → Pay → Alerts (preferences) → Done. Preferences step shows all 14 brands as checkboxes, alert type toggles (price_drop, new_release), and saves correctly. Success step shows membership card with alert preferences summary.

scheduler_api.GET /api/scheduler/status: PASS - Returns is_running, last_run, next_run, interval_minutes=15, results
scheduler_api.POST /api/scheduler/trigger: PASS - Triggers scrape cycle, returns status=running
scheduler_api.scheduler_results: PASS - Results include scraped count, new products, price drops, alerts sent per brand

preferences_api.POST /api/preferences: PASS - Saves brands and alert_types for subscriber
preferences_api.empty_brands: PASS - Empty brands array means all brands
preferences_api.price_drop_only: PASS - Can save with only price_drop alert type
preferences_api.new_release_only: PASS - Can save with only new_release alert type

alerts_api.GET /api/alerts/recent: PASS - Returns recent alert log entries
alerts_api.alert_structure: PASS - Entries have phone, store, message, sent, createdAt

subscription_flow_5_steps.step_1_verify: PASS - Phone input, send OTP, verify OTP
subscription_flow_5_steps.step_2_details: PASS - Name input, proceed to payment
subscription_flow_5_steps.step_4_preferences: PASS - Alert type toggles, 14 brand checkboxes, save preferences
subscription_flow_5_steps.step_5_success: PASS - Membership card with alert preferences summary

mocked_apis.twilio_whatsapp: SANDBOX mode - logs messages, doesn't actually send
